body:
Sent from my Huawei Mobile
Dear Francois
Tgis girl has been referred by a business partner
I want you to find her a job at anantara based on her qualifications if you need more info please contact Jeffrey he is copied on this email
From: "jeffrey E." <jeevacation@gmail.com<mailto:jeevacation@gmail.com>>
Date: August 13, 2018 at 3:55:09 PM GMT+3
To: Sultan Bin Sulayem <ssulayem@me.com<mailto:ssulayem@me.com>>

can we find a position for her in any dubai hotel.?

--
